title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Longtime NPR host David Greene sues Google over NotebookLM voice
items.description: The longtime host of NPR’s “Morning Edition,” is suing Google, alleging that the male podcast voice in the company’s NotebookLM tool is based on him.

items.title: India has 100M weekly active ChatGPT users, Sam Altman says
items.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says India has the largest number of student users of ChatGPT worldwide.

items.title: OpenClaw creator Peter Steinberger joins OpenAI
items.description: OpenAI said OpenClaw will live on as an open source project.

items.title: Anthropic and the Pentagon are reportedly arguing over Claude usage
items.description: The apparent issue: whether Claude can be used for mass domestic surveillance and autonomous weapons.

items.title: The enterprise AI land grab is on. Glean is building the layer beneath the interface.
items.description: In this week's episode of the Equity podcast, Glean CEO Arvind Jain explains the company's shift from enterprise search tool to middleware layer for e...

items.title: Designer Kate Barton teams up with IBM and Fiducia AI for a NYFW presentation
items.description: Designer Kate Barton teams up with Fiducia AI and IBM for a NYFW presentation.

items.title: Hollywood isn’t happy about the new Seedance 2.0 video generator
items.description: Hollywood organizations are pushing back against a new AI video model called Seedance 2.0, which they say has quickly become a tool for “blatant” copy...

items.title: ‘Clueless’ -inspired app Alta partners with brand Public School to start integrating styling tools into websites
items.description: This week, Alta unveiled its first integration collaboration, teaming up with Public School, a storied New York City brand.

items.title: India doubles down on state-backed venture capital, approving $1.1B fund
items.description: India’s $1.1B fund-of-funds will invest through private VCs to support deep-tech and manufacturing startups.

items.title: In a changed VC landscape, this exec is doubling down on overlooked founders
items.description: As much of Silicon Valley chases mega-rounds and buzzy AI deals, Stacy Brown-Philpot is running Cherryrock Capital like a throwback to venture capital...
